message:
fix(parser): preserve valid edge prefix when chain has malformed trailing segment

Previously, a chain like A-->B--> with a malformed trailing segment
(empty right side, unparseable node, or failed intern_node) caused the
entire chain to be discarded including the valid A-->B prefix. Now the
parser returns the already-collected touched_nodes when at least one
valid edge was parsed, ensuring partial chains degrade gracefully.

Adds test verifying that a malformed chain inside a subgraph preserves
the valid edge and correct cluster membership for both nodes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
